summary: P1 Customer Portal: Contracts + Projects testing completed. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows working correctly. Contract signing flow (legal modules, signature canvas, accept/decline/change-request) fully functional.

✅ Customer Portal: Contract list shows contract_number, type, amount, status
✅ Customer Portal: Click contract opens detail view with calculation, appendices, legal modules
✅ Customer Portal: Legal module checkboxes (required marked with *)
✅ Customer Portal: Signature canvas (draw) - mouse interaction working
✅ Customer Portal: Signature name input (type) - alternative working
✅ Customer Portal: Accept button disabled until all required legal + signature
✅ Customer Portal: Accept contract creates evidence (POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/accept)
✅ Customer Portal: Decline contract with reason (POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/decline)
✅ Customer Portal: Status messages after accept/decline/change
✅ Customer Portal: Projekte tab visible with project list
✅ Customer Portal: Project detail with sections, handover, progress bar
✅ Customer Portal: Project chat (send + view messages)
✅ Backend: GET /api/customer/contracts marks contract as viewed
✅ Backend: POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/accept validates required legal modules
✅ Admin: Verträge nav item and contract list/detail working
seed_data_creation: Test contracts created with prefix 'TEST_' for various scenarios (accept, decline, change-request)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Customer Portal fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/customer/contracts (list), GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} (detail, marks as viewed), POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/accept (requires signature_type, signature_data, legal_modules_accepted), POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/decline (with reason), POST /api/customer/contracts/{id}/request-change (with requested_changes). Customer auth uses magic links - get portal URL via POST /api/admin/customers/portal-access, then verify token via POST /api/auth/verify-token. Legal modules: agb, datenschutz, ki_hinweise, zahlungsbedingungen (required), sla, auftragsverarbeitung (optional). Evidence package includes: timestamp, IP, user_agent, document_hash, contract_version, consent_status, legal_modules_accepted, signature_type, signature_data.

customer_portal_contracts.contract_detail: ✅ GET /api/customer/contracts/{id} returns detail with legal modules, appendices, document hash
customer_portal_contracts.mark_as_viewed: ✅ Opening contract changes status from 'sent' to 'viewed'
customer_portal_contracts.accept_validation: ✅ Requires all required legal modules + signature
customer_portal_contracts.accept_contract: ✅ Creates evidence package with full audit trail
customer_portal_contracts.change_request: ✅ Records requested changes and creates evidence

customer_portal_projects.project_detail: ✅ GET /api/customer/projects/{id} returns sections, chat, latest version

admin_contracts.contract_detail: ✅ GET /api/admin/contracts/{id} with appendices, evidence, legal modules

frontend_ui.contracts_tab: ✅ Shows contract count, list with status badges
frontend_ui.legal_checkboxes: ✅ Required modules marked with *, checkbox interaction working
frontend_ui.signature_canvas: ✅ Drawing works with mouse, clear button functional
frontend_ui.accept_button: ✅ Disabled until requirements met, enables correctly
